news.title: UIC student leaders honored with annual chancellor’s awards
news.summary_en: Almost 500 students were awarded for their impact across campus and across Chicago.

news.title: UIC Urban Forum will examine public service in America
news.summary_en: The April 22 event will explore the public sector’s future amid political, economic and social change.

news.title: UIC jazz saxophonist named Guggenheim fellow
news.summary_en: Jon Irabagon is among 223 artists, scientists, writers and scholars selected for the competitive honor.

news.title: UIC Engineering launches AI curriculum initiatives
news.summary_en: Courses give students tools to harness the transformative power of generative AI in computing.

news.title: From her mother’s kitchen to Chicago’s food deserts
news.summary_en: Brianna Guerrier makes a case for nutrition as justice.

news.title: Students volunteer across Chicago for Day of Service
news.summary_en: The Day of Service in April is UIC’s largest annual volunteer event.

news.title: Two years of making and teaching: Inside UIC’s Master of Fine Arts program
news.summary_en: Attend the Friday, April 17, opening reception at Gallery 400.

news.title: Earvin ‘Magic’ Johnson brings 10,000-megawatt smile and inspiration to UIC Chair Chats
news.summary_en: The third installment of the Chair Chats series welcomes NBA great to UIC.

news.title: Crain’s Chicago Business recognizes notable UIC leaders
news.summary_en: Nine outstanding UIC innovators were honored for contributions in fields ranging from health care to sustainability.
